## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `golangci-lint run` passes locally
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Public APIs have Go doc comments
- [ ] No new external dependencies introduced
